class CfgPatches {
    class CustomAddon {
        units[] = {"CustomRifleman", "CustomGrenadier", "CustomMedic", "CustomTank"};
        weapons[] = {"CustomRifle"};
        requiredVersion = 1.85;
        requiredAddons[] = {"CARescue", "CAWeapons"};
        author = "Custom Addon Team";
        version = "1.0";
    };
};

class CfgFactionClasses {
    class CustomFaction {
        displayName = "Custom Armed Forces";
        priority = 10;
        side = 1;
        icon = "\CustomAddon\data\faction_icon.paa";
    };
};

class CfgVehicleClasses {
    class CustomInfantry {
        displayName = "Custom Infantry";
    };
};

class CfgWeapons {
    class Rifle;
    class SyntheticRifle : Rifle {};
    
    class CustomRifle : SyntheticRifle {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "Custom Battle Rifle";
        displayNameMagazine = "40Rnd Custom Mag";
        model = "\CustomAddon\weapons\custom_rifle.p3d";
        picture = "\CustomAddon\weapons\equip_custom_rifle.paa";
        magazines[] = {"CustomMag"};
        reloadTime = 0.08;
        magazineReloadTime = 3.0;
        recoil = "CustomRifleRecoil";
        modes[] = {"Single", "Burst", "FullAuto"};
    };
};

class CfgMagazines {
    class CA_Magazine;
    class SyntheticMagazine : CA_Magazine {};
    
    class CustomMag : SyntheticMagazine {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "40Rnd Custom Magazine";
        ammo = "B_556x45_Ball";
        count = 40;
        initSpeed = 950;
        picture = "\CustomAddon\data\equip_custom_mag.paa";
        model = "\CustomAddon\weapons\mag_custom.p3d";
    };
};

class CfgVehicles {
    class All {};
    class AllVehicles : All {};
    class Land : AllVehicles {};
    class Man : Land {};
    class Soldier : Man {};
    class SyntheticSoldierWest : Soldier {};
    
    class CustomRifleman : SyntheticSoldierWest {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "Custom Rifleman";
        vehicleClass = "CustomInfantry";
        side = 1;
        faction = "CustomFaction";
        model = "\CustomAddon\soldiers\custom_soldier.p3d";
        weapons[] = {"CustomRifle", "Binocular", "Throw", "Put"};
        magazines[] = {"CustomMag", "CustomMag", "CustomMag", "CustomMag", "CustomMag", "HandGrenade", "HandGrenade"};
        respawnWeapons[] = {"CustomRifle", "Binocular", "Throw", "Put"};
        respawnMagazines[] = {"CustomMag", "CustomMag", "CustomMag", "CustomMag", "CustomMag", "HandGrenade", "HandGrenade"};
        class EventHandlers {
            init = "_this exec ""\CustomAddon\scripts\init.sqs""";
        };
    };
    
    class CustomGrenadier : CustomRifleman {
        displayName = "Custom Grenadier";
        weapons[] = {"CustomRifle", "SyntheticLauncher", "Throw", "Put"};
        magazines[] = {"CustomMag", "CustomMag", "CustomMag", "SyntheticGrenadeRound", "SyntheticGrenadeRound", "SyntheticGrenadeRound", "HandGrenade", "HandGrenade"};
    };
    
    class CustomMedic : CustomRifleman {
        displayName = "Custom Medic";
        attendant = 1;
        icon = "\CustomAddon\data\medic_icon.paa";
        backpack = "MedicBackpack";
    };
    
    class Tank;
    class SyntheticTankAlpha : Tank {};
    
    class CustomTank : SyntheticTankAlpha {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "Custom MBT";
        faction = "CustomFaction";
        vehicleClass = "CustomArmor";
        model = "\CustomAddon\vehicles\custom_tank.p3d";
        picture = "\CustomAddon\vehicles\equip_custom_tank.paa";
        armor = 1000;
        class Turret {
            gunnerAction = "CustomTankGunner";
            weapons[] = {"CustomCannon", "M240Coax"};
            magazines[] = {"CustomCannon_APFSDS", "CustomCannon_APFSDS", "CustomCannon_HEAT", "M240_200Rnd", "M240_200Rnd"};
        };
        class Damage {
            tex[] = {};
            mat[] = {
                "CustomAddon\vehicles\data\custom_tank.rvmat",
                "CustomAddon\vehicles\data\custom_tank_damage.rvmat",
                "CustomAddon\vehicles\data\custom_tank_destruct.rvmat"
            };
        };
    };
};

class CfgAmmo {
    class BulletCore;
    class B_556x45_Ball : BulletCore {};
    
    class CustomBullet : B_556x45_Ball {
        hit = 12;
        typicalSpeed = 950;
        caliber = 1.2;
    };
};

class CfgSounds {
    class CustomRifleShot {
        name = "CustomRifleShot";
        sound[] = {"\CustomAddon\sounds\rifle_shot.wss", db+5, 1.0, 900};
        titles[] = {};
    };
};
